incidents.headline: Road damage report — accidente Vía Centenario
incidents.recommended_action: ⚡ PRIORITY VISIT — Inspect Vía Centenario within 24hrs. 4/5 sources confirmed. Bring 3-5 boxes PowerPatch.
incidents.sv_description: The road surface on Vía Centenario appears to be in generally good condition with intact asphalt. While there are some minor surface irregularities and what appears to be a small patch repair visible in Image 1, there are no true potholes with missing asphalt or exposed base material visible in any of the five images. The highway shows typical wear patterns but no holes or depressions that would constitute a pothole hazard.

incidents.headline: Road damage report — accidente Corredor Norte
incidents.recommended_action: ⚡ PRIORITY VISIT — Inspect Corredor Norte within 24hrs. 5/5 sources confirmed. Bring 3-5 boxes PowerPatch.
incidents.sv_description: The road surface on Corredor Norte appears to be in good condition across all viewing angles. The highway shows clean concrete pavement with no visible holes, depressions, or missing asphalt sections. The road markings are intact and there are no signs of the type of damage that would cause an accident.

incidents.headline: Road damage report — accidente Transístmica
incidents.recommended_action: ⚡ PRIORITY VISIT — Inspect Transístmica within 24hrs. 3/5 sources confirmed. Bring 3-5 boxes PowerPatch.
incidents.sv_description: No true potholes with missing asphalt and exposed base material are visible in any of the five images. The road surfaces shown along Transístmica appear to be in generally fair condition with normal wear but no distinct holes or depressions where asphalt is physically missing. The images show typical commercial area roadway with vehicles, but no clear evidence of the type of pothole damage that would cause an accident.
